title: UDBG_Port
text: UDBG_Port Specifies the port number of the machine on which the Uniface Debugger process is listening. UDBG_Port = PortNumber For example: udbg_port=13005 Default value: First available port number, starting with 13001 File section: [install] Description The port number is automatically assigned during Uniface installation. Related Links UDBG_Machine Specifies the host identifier of the machine where the Uniface Debugger is located. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
